Records.authors: Roberto Bonciani, Vittorio Del Duca, Hjalte Frellesvig, Johannes M. Henn, Francesco Moriello, Vladimir A. Smirnov
Records.description: The authors present all the planar master integrals which contribute to the two-loop scattering amplitudes for Higgs→3 partons in the Euclidean region. They use 4 integral families and provide results in terms of linear combinations of master integrals. They compute master integrals containing elliptic sectors. They result with one- and two-fold iterated integrals for the non-elliptic and elliptic sectors, respectively.
